common.enterVerificationCode: Saisissez le code de vérification ou <0>recommencez</0>
common.tagline: Portfolio universel d'apprentissage et de travail

error.generic: Une erreur est survenue. Veuillez réessayer.
error.network: Problème de connexion. Veuillez vérifier votre connexion internet et réessayer.
error.unauthorized: Vous n'avez pas la permission d'effectuer cette action.
error.sessionExpired: Votre session a expiré. Veuillez vous reconnecter.

theme.title: Choisissez votre thème
theme.subtitleColorfulFormal: Basculez entre notre expérience colorée signature et un style classique et formel.

scanner.title: Scanner le code QR
scanner.downloadQrCodeDescription: Partagez ou imprimez votre code QR {{brand}}.
scanner.saveFailed: Échec de l'enregistrement du code QR.
scanner.savePdfFailed: Échec de l'enregistrement du code QR en PDF.
scanner.camPermDesc: New connection requests, New boosts (like achievements, credentials, and badges) via QR codes.

share.generateLinkFailed: Échec de la génération du lien d'invitation
share.inviteLinkCopied: Lien d'invitation copié dans le presse-papiers
share.inviteLinkCopyFailed: Impossible de copier le lien d'invitation dans le presse-papiers
share.profileLinkCopied: Lien de profil copié dans le presse-papiers
share.profileLinkCopyFailed: Impossible de copier le lien de profil dans le presse-papiers

verification.title: Vérifications du justificatif
verification.infoText: Les vérifications de justificatifs contrôlent la preuve cryptographique des justificatifs numériques pour garantir leur authenticité et leur exactitude.

message.couldNotVerify: Le justificatif Boost n’a pas pu être vérifié.

introSlides.badgesDesc: Badges help to recognize values, talents, participation and contributions.
introSlides.organizeTroopsDesc: Soon local troops can self organize and issue official scout badges.

auth.downloadScoutPass: You can also download ScoutPass on your smartphone or tablet:
auth.sessionExpiredDesc: Your sign-in session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.
auth.sessionExpiredSignOutDesc: Your sign-in session has expired. Please sign out and sign back in to continue.
auth.uidMismatch: You signed in with a different account. Please try again with the correct account.

login.signInWithAccess: Sign in with <0>{{name}}</0> to access your account.
login.signInBelowAccess: Now just sign in below to access your account.
login.deviceLinkedFinish: Device linked — sign in to finish
login.verificationSentToast: A verification code has been sent

userProfile.deleteWarning: Deleting your account will permanently delete your identity on ScoutPass and all of your credentials. <0>Warning, this action cannot be undone!</0>

toasts.didCopyError: Unable to copy DID to clipboard

methodPicker.title: Verify Your Identity
methodPicker.descNewDevice: This device hasn't been set up for your account yet. Choose a method to sign in.
methodPicker.descStaleKey: Your account security was recently updated on another device. Please verify to continue.
methodPicker.restoreDescMissing: Choose how you'd like to restore access to your account.
methodPicker.restoreDescDefault: Choose how you'd like to restore access.

method.emailDesc: Paste the key sent to your email
method.passkeyDesc: Use Face ID, Touch ID, or similar
method.deviceDesc: Scan a code from a signed-in device

passkey.title: Passkey
passkey.desc: Use your device's biometric authentication to recover.
passkey.tapDesc: Tap below to verify with Face ID, Touch ID, or your device passkey.

phrase.title: Recovery Phrase
phrase.desc: Enter your 25-word recovery phrase, separated by spaces.
phrase.label: Your phrase

device.title: Sign In from Another Device
device.desc: Scan the QR code below with a device that's already signed in to your account.

email.title: Recover via Email
email.descWithEmail: We previously sent a recovery email to <0>{{email}}</0>. Open that email and follow the steps below.
email.descWithoutEmail: We previously sent a recovery email to your recovery address. Open that email and follow the steps below.
email.findKey: How to find your recovery key
email.step1: Search your inbox for an email with the subject <0>"Your ScoutPass Recovery Key"</0>
email.step2: Find the long string of characters between <0>"RECOVERY KEY"</0> and <1>"END RECOVERY KEY"</1>
email.step3: Copy that entire string and paste it below
email.keyPlaceholder: Paste your recovery key here — it looks like a long string of letters and numbers
email.keyHint: The key is a long string of letters and numbers. Copy and paste it exactly as it appears in the email.

backup.title: Backup File
backup.desc: Upload your backup file and enter the password you used when creating it.

errors.noPasskey: No passkey found on this device.
errors.phraseIncomplete: Please enter all 25 words of your recovery phrase.
errors.noBackupPass: Please enter the password for your backup file.
errors.noEmailKey: Please paste the recovery key from your email.
errors.phraseInvalid: The recovery phrase doesn't look right. Please check for typos.
errors.decryptFailed: Incorrect password or corrupted data. Please try again.

setup.descNew: Set up a recovery method so you can get back in if you lose access to this device.

passkey.notSupported: Passkeys aren't supported on this device or browser. Try using a recovery phrase or backup file instead.
passkey.updateWarning: This will replace your current passkey.
passkey.desc: Use Face ID, Touch ID, or Windows Hello as your recovery method. Nothing to remember.
passkey.chromeOnly: Passkeys with encryption are currently supported on desktop Chrome and Edge only.
passkey.bulletBiometric: Uses your device's secure biometric authentication

phrase.updateWarning: This will generate a new phrase. Your previous phrase will no longer work.
phrase.desc: Generate a 25-word phrase that can restore your account from anywhere. Write it down and keep it safe.
phrase.warningWritePaper: Write it on paper and store it securely
phrase.warningNeverShare: Never share it — anyone with this phrase has full access

backup.updateWarning: This will generate a new backup file. Your previous backup file will no longer work.
backup.desc: Generate an encrypted backup file protected by a password. Store it somewhere safe — you'll need both the file and the password to recover.
backup.readyDesc: Download this file and store it somewhere safe. You'll need it along with your backup password to recover.

email.updateWarning: This will replace your current recovery email.
email.desc: Add a personal email (different from your login) as a recovery destination. A recovery key will be sent there.
email.codeSent: We sent a 6-digit code to <0>{{email}}</0>. Check your inbox.
email.sendKeyDesc: We'll send a recovery key to this email. If you ever lose access, just check your inbox and paste the key to recover.
email.keySentDesc: Check your inbox at {{email}}. Keep that email safe — you'll need the recovery key if you ever lose access.

errors.passLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.downloadFailed: Could not save the file. Please try again.

setup.hintOneMissing: We recommend setting up at least two recovery methods.
setup.hintMore: Adding another method improves your security.

success.phrase: Recovery phrase saved! Keep it somewhere safe.
success.backup: Backup file saved! Keep it and your password somewhere safe.
success.email: Recovery key sent to your email!

networkPrompts.setupProf: Set up your profile to get started!

join.title: Join the ScoutPass Network?
join.desc: The ScoutPass Network allows you to exchange credentials and badges with other members.
join.accessDet: Send and receive connection requests, display your profile photo and name in your connections’ contacts lists.

optOut.joinLater: You can still use ScoutPass without joining the network.
optOut.limit: You won’t be able to send Boosts or connect with others, but you can still sync credentials. You can join later anytime.

reject.credAccess: You can still receive and share credentials with “school connect” and your <0>ScoutPass number</0>.

errorLogout.msg: There was a sign-in error. Please log out and log back into the app to fix this error.

settings.sendReqDesc: ScoutPass acts as a gateway that sends encrypted connection requests on your behalf.
settings.recvReqDesc: ScoutPass acts as a gateway that receives encrypted connection requests on your behalf.
settings.showName: Display name in your connections’ contact lists.
settings.nameDesc: Your name will appear in your connection’s contact list, but it is never be displayed publicly or shared otherwise without your express permission.
settings.showPhoto: Display profile photo in your connections’ contact lists.
settings.photoDesc: Your profile photo will appear in your connection’s contact list, but it is never be displayed publicly or shared otherwise without your express permission.

toasts.lostConn: Oops! It seems you’ve lost your connection. The app may not function properly and you will not be able to send boosts.

notifications.pushDescription: New connection requests, New boosts (like achievements, credentials, and badges).
notifications.settingConnectionRequestsDesc: When someone scans your code or clicks your user links it will initiate a network request that you can accept or deny.
notifications.settingNewBoostsDesc: Boosts include all types of credentials including:  Skills, IDs, Achievements, Learning History, Work History, Currency, and Badges.

boost.whoToSend: Who do you want to send to?
boost.pleaseLoginToClaim: Please login to claim your boost/credential.
boost.areYouSureDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
boost.selfSubtext: You can issue yourself credentials to tell your story. Your skills are currencies for your future.
boost.someoneSubtext: Issue credentials to people you know, teach and admire. Every boost of encouragement counts.

toasts.unableToCopyLink: Unable to copy share link to clipboard
toasts.unableToCopyJson: Unable to copy JSON to clipboard

boostCMS.promptPublish: Your boost is published and no more edits can be made. You can return to issuing or quit to start over.
